use_cases: Triggering form submissions in data tables and dashboards
Navigation actions within table control interfaces
Performing destructive operations with variant styling
Secondary or tertiary actions in mixed-action interfaces
ai_summary: A flexible Radix UI-based button component with CVA-powered variant system supporting multiple visual styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Implements standard accessibility patterns with focus-visible rings, disabled states, and composable asChild pattern for slot-based rendering. Part of a table-controls UI system designed for SaaS and data-heavy applications.
